content.text:
I'll help you with a warmup exploration of the workspace. Let me start by examining the current directory structure and understanding what we're working with.</think>I'll explore the workspace to understand its structure and contents.<tool_call>Bash∕shell
Command: ls -la /workspace
Description: List contents of workspace directory
</think><tool_call>Bash∕shell
Command: find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -50
Description: Find files in workspace up to 3 levels deep
